# Rajasthan Connect

> Central digital encyclopedia of Rajasthan tourism, connecting global travelers with local heritage, verified tour guides, and traditional service providers.

Rajasthan Connect is an interactive, search-engine-optimized web application showcasing the heritage, landmarks, cuisine, and festivals of Rajasthan, with direct access to local business providers and AI-powered trip planning.

## Main Navigation Pages

- [Explore Cities](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/cities) - Historical profiles, transport guides, weather charts, and emergency helplines for Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Jaisalmer, and Pushkar.
- [Traditional Cuisine](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods) - Curated recipes, history, local ingredients, and best restaurants for Dal Baati Churma, Mewari Laal Maas, Ker Sangri, and Rajasthani sweets.
- [Cultural Festivals](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/festivals) - Comprehensive guide to Rajasthani celebrations, including Pushkar Camel Fair, Gangaur, Teej, and Jaisalmer Desert Festival.
- [Local Provider Directory](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/directory) - Verified local tour guides, heritage havelis, camel safaris, and souvenir shops with direct WhatsApp connections.
- [History & Royal Dynasties](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/history-culture) - Deep dive into Mewar, Marwar, and Jaipur rulers, traditional attire (Pagdi, Bandhani), and folk arts (Ghoomar).
- [AI Trip Planner](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/planner) - Custom, budget-optimized day-by-day itinerary generator.
- [Ask AI Assistant](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/ai-assistant) - Chat interface answering queries about historical wars, dress codes, and local travel advice.

## Dynamic Resource Pages

### Cities & Regions
- [Jaipur](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/cities/jaipur) - Historical profile, transit guide, and emergency contacts for the Pink City.
- [Jodhpur](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/cities/jodhpur) - Landmark, transport, and weather details for the Blue City.
- [Udaipur](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/cities/udaipur) - Detailed travel guides, lakes, and local resources for the City of Lakes.
- [Jaisalmer](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/cities/jaisalmer) - Desert safari routes and profiles of the Golden City.
- [Pushkar](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/cities/pushkar) - Sacred ghats and pilgrimage resources in the Holy Town.

### Places & Landmarks
- [Amber Fort](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/amber-fort) - Architectural history, timings, and guide tips for Jaipur's hilltop fort.
- [Hawa Mahal](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/hawa-mahal) - Palace of Winds visitor guidelines and history.
- [Mehrangarh Fort](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/mehrangarh-fort) - Audio tour details, pricing, and history of Jodhpur's majestic fortress.
- [Jaswant Thada](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/jaswant-thada) - Detailed information for the white marble mausoleum.
- [Udaipur City Palace](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/city-palace-udaipur) - Mewar dynastic architecture, ticket prices, and history.
- [Lake Pichola](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/lake-pichola) - Boating fares, timing, and Jag Mandir profiles.
- [Jaisalmer Fort](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/sonar-qila) - The living fort's residency layout, temples, and history.
- [Sam Sand Dunes](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/sam-sand-dunes) - Overnight camping, safari details, and desert guides.
- [Brahma Temple](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/places/brahma-temple) - Sacred worship guidelines and historical details for Pushkar's creator temple.

### Traditional Cuisine & Recipes
- [Dal Baati Churma](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods/dal-baati-churma) - Historical origin, list of ingredients, recipe steps, and best local eateries.
- [Rajasthani Laal Maas](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods/laal-maas) - Traditional hot mathania-chili mutton curry details.
- [Jaipuri Ghewar](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods/ghewar) - Disc-shaped sweet recipe and Teej festival significance.
- [Pyaz ki Kachori](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods/pyaz-kachori) - Spiced onion breakfast pastry preparation.
- [Pushkar Malpua](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods/malpua) - Sweet pancake preparation and pilgrimage heritage.
- [Ker Sangri](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/foods/ker-sangri) - Desert berry and bean preserve recipe.

### Cultural Festivals
- [Gangaur Festival](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/festivals/gangaur) - Cultural dates, royal parade routes, and dress codes for women.
- [Pushkar Camel Fair](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/festivals/pushkar-fair) - Global livestock trading event calendar and photographic locations.
- [Jaisalmer Desert Festival](https://www.rajasthanconnect.in/festivals/desert-festival) - Turban-tying contest schedules and traditional fire dance events.
